# Ewan Croft

Full-stack developer, poet, and pagan building tools for the decentralized web and esoteric language compilers.

## Overview
I focus on AT Protocol (ATProto) ecosystem development, digital sovereignty, and self-hosted infrastructure. My work bridges the gap between legacy social platforms and the open social web.

## Primary Repositories
- [ewanc26/pkgs](https://github.com/ewanc26/pkgs): Monorepo for ATProto tools (Malachite, Opal, Jasper, Bismuth, Tourmaline).
- [ewanc26/website](https://github.com/ewanc26/website): SvelteKit-based personal site powered by ATProto.
- [ewanc26/nix](https://github.com/ewanc26/nix): NixOS configurations for PDS and server infrastructure.

## Key ATProto Tools
- **Malachite**: Last.fm/Spotify → Teal.fm (Music history).
- **Opal**: Twitter/Mastodon/Threads/Nostr → Bluesky (Microblog history).
- **Jasper**: Instagram → Grain/Spark (Photo/Video history).
- **Bismuth**: Standard.site (richtext-block) → Markdown.
- **Tourmaline**: Teal.fm analyzer & listener personality generator.

## Design Philosophy
My projects use a dynamic OKLCH-based color system interpolating between seasonal hues (the eight Sabbats). Typography centers on Inter. Emphasis on privacy (browser-based tools) and data ownership.

## Cultural Context
- **Heritage**: Anglo-Scottish.
- **Language**: Learning Scottish Gaelic (Gàidhlig na h-Alba).
- **Spirituality**: Pagan, following the Wheel of the Year.
